decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the Codex minor GC harder-case/eval work. Older resolved block: added guarded relation support for `continue`, added fixed live eval cases including `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` and `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return`, and tightened the packaged guard so it cannot override a shadow-guard veto; user explicitly wanted non-whitelist behavior. Immediate raw context should center on the later test/pass discussion and the user's latest `继续`.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active task, so `continue` fits. The next turn likely depends on the recent exchange about rerunning tests and proceeding, so keep the later raw turns. The earlier add-case / tighten-guard block is mostly resolved and can leave the next-turn raw prompt, but its implementation outcomes and the user's non-whitelist preference should survive as compact pins.
